title: cupheanthus neocaledonicus
intro: Cupheanthus neocaledonicus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to New Caledonia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties, providing benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Cupheanthus neocaledonicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
